def clean_type_mangle(df, col_name):

    df[col_name] = pd.to_numeric(df[col_name])
    median_val = df[col_name].median()
    df[col_name] = df[col_name].fillna(median_val)

clean_type_mangle(df, 'Shucked_weight')
clean_type_mangle(df, 'Whole_weight')

action_content:
def clean_type_mangle_v2(df, col_name):
    bad_values = df[col_name][pd.to_numeric(df[col_name], errors='coerce').isna() & df[col_name].notna()]
    df[col_name] = df[col_name].replace(bad_values.unique().tolist(), float('nan'))
    df[col_name] = pd.to_numeric(df[col_name, errors='coerce')
    median_val = df[col_name].median()
    df[col_name] = df[col_name].fillna(median_val)

clean_type_mangle_v2(df, 'Shucked_weight')
clean_type_mangle_v2(df, 'Whole_weight
